 */import React,{useRef,useEffect}from'react';import{useCodex}from'../context/CodexContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const LatticePage=()=>{const{state,isConnected,error,injectSignal}=useCodex();const canvasRef=useRef(null);// Simple 3D lattice renderer (placeholder)
